title: The Moment Whistleblower David Grusch Learned UFOs Are Real

transcript.text: what's the first moment where you saw
irrefutable evidence that what you're
dealing with is truth is reality I mean
there were certain military cases you
know we were analyzing that I I just
really couldn't explain in a prosaic
fashion and then of course you know read
some Intel reports that were provided to
me in that regard and I took that and I
went to the the agencies that you know
wrote those reports and asked for Access
and when I when they deny you access
then you know it's a things and that's
what happened to me time after time over
a couple years so there wasn't a a
singular moment where you're like just
open the folder and you go what the [ __ ]
is that it was kind of like a slowburn
culmination as I was processing it
allowing my worldview to open and yeah I
don't know if there was a singular
moment I think it was you know some of
the really really trusted highlevel
people we talk to when they you know
stared us straight in the face very
seriously and confirmed a lot of this
information
